description: Send notifications to your own DOT destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise dot:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway channels skip Apprise and transform the envelope into a native DOT API {message} payload delivered straight to the DOT device API.
name: msg-to-dot

request.template: {"urls":"dot://${ customer_secrets.DOT_APIKEY }@${ customer_secrets.DOT_DEVICE_ID }/","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

{"urls":"dot://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.apikey_secret }} }@${ customer_secrets.{{ params.device_id_secret }} }/","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}
{"message":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}}
{"message":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}}
